strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production roles
Full-stack breadth from databases to UI, including AWS and Kubernetes exposure
Track record of clean architecture, TDD, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level/junior position
Located in San Francisco while role requires high on-site presence
Limited explicit PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience (MongoDB-heavy background)
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure that far exceeds the technical bar for this junior/mid-level role. However, the position is explicitly entry-level with on-site requirements, while the candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer based in San Francisco. Database stack also leans MongoDB rather than the preferred PostgreSQL, and Nest.js is not mentioned.
